name: Blackboard (Anthology) Learn REST API
what_it_does: Blackboard Learn (now Anthology Learn) REST API for enterprise learning management system. Enables AI agents to manage course creation and enrollment automation, handle user provisioning and institutional roster management, access grade column and attempt data management, retrieve course content and material management, manage group and collaboration tool configuration, handle assignment and assessment submission tracking, access learning analytics and student activity data, retrieve system configuration and administration data, manage calendar and scheduling automation, and integrate Blackboard learning data with SIS, identity management, and institutional analytics platforms.
use_cases: Automating student enrollment from SIS integration agents
Managing course structure and content from instructional technology agents
Accessing grade and submission data from academic analytics agents
Integrating Blackboard with identity management from IT operations agents
not_for: Corporate compliance training without higher education LMS features
Lightweight training tracking without full enterprise LMS capability
Consumer education platforms without institutional deployment
best_when: A higher education institution using Blackboard Learn wants AI agents to automate enrollment management, grade tracking, course configuration, SIS integration, and academic analytics.
avoid_when: EDUCATIONAL RISK: FERPA compliance required for US student data. Blackboard Original vs Ultra experience have API capability differences — test against target deployment. Grade modification automation requires academic integrity safeguards and faculty approval workflows.

auth.notes: Blackboard Learn uses OAuth 2.0 with client credentials and authorization code flows. Application registration via Developer Portal. REST API with scopes for courses, users, grades, and content. Developer documentation at developer.blackboard.com. Webhooks for course and enrollment events. SDKs for Python, Java, .NET. B2 building blocks (Java) for older integrations.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Developer sandbox available; production requires institutional license
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual institutional subscription; pricing per student
pricing.notes: Boca Raton, Florida. Anthology (merger with Anthology 2021). Private (Providence Equity). Oldest major LMS — launched 1997. 17,000+ institutional customers. Blackboard Learn Ultra is the modern cloud-native version. Strong US higher education market. SaaS (SaaS Learn) and managed-hosting options. Competes with Canvas and D2L for higher education LMS.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth application; bulk operations for large institutions

known_agent_gotchas: FERPA RISK: Student academic records require FERPA-compliant data handling and access logging
Original vs Ultra experience — Blackboard Original and Learn Ultra have different API capabilities; test against deployment version
Developer sandbox required — always test in developer sandbox before production integration
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API via developer portal requiring institutional relationship
Legacy B2 building blocks — some deep integrations still use Java B2 framework not REST API
Anthology merger — verify product roadmap continuity under Anthology umbrella post-2021 merger
agent_readiness.security_notes: Higher education LMS. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, FERPA, WCAG. OAuth2. US/EU/AU. Student academic records and FERPA-protected data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Higher education LMS. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, FERPA. OAuth2. US/EU/AU. Student records and academic data.
